creator: me@cschwarz.com
text:
As mentioned in the title, databases/mariadb100-server and databases/mariadb100-client are not updated to the latest release 10.0.22 in the quarterly branch of the ports tree.

There is a CVE affecting these outdated versions:
https://www.vuxml.org/freebsd/851a0eea-88aa-11e5-90e7-b499baebfeaf.html

Please also make sure future updates with security issues reach the quarterly branches.
